## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem does this fix or what does it improve?

## Test

How did you verify this works?
- [ ] Ran `/living-docs` on a real project
- [ ] Ran `/living-docs --dry-run` and got expected output
- [ ] Ran `/living-docs --all` without false positives
- [ ] Hook warning fires correctly / does not fire when disabled

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know.
